revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-045

Alternative term: Spherical Mirror

A type of mirror the reflecting surface of which is a portion of a sphere. Light rays emitted by a point source placed at the centre of the sphere are returned through the centre. Such mirrors are usually used as reinforcing mirrors.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig13.jpg|400px|border]]

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Spherical Reflector}}
